answers: Debugging tips: Read error messages carefully, check syntax, use print statements, Google the error, check Stack Overflow.
To fix errors: read the full error message, check your syntax, add print statements to trace the issue, and search the error on Stack Overflow.
Debugging strategy: reproduce the error, isolate the problem, read the traceback carefully, and test with simple inputs.
First step: don't panic! Read the error message top to bottom, Google it with your language name, and check Stack Overflow.
